programme.desc: When the highly respected British statesman Sir Thomas More (Paul Scofield) refuses to pressure the Pope into annulling the marriage of King Henry VIII (Robert Shaw) and his Spanish-born wife, More's clashes with the monarch increase in intensity. A devout Catholic, More stands by his religious principles and moves to leave the royal court. Unfortunately, the King and his loyalists aren't appeased by this, and press forward with grave charges of treason, further testing More's resolve.

programme.title: Phantom Valley
programme.desc: The Durango Kid (Charles Starrett) finds the troublemaker behind a range war.

programme.title: San Antonio
programme.desc: Rancher Clay Hardin (Errol Flynn) has discovered that local saloon owner Roy Stuart (Paul Kelly) is selling cattle that doesn't belong to him, including some of Clay's own stolen stock. Armed with a tally book that proves it, Hardin now finds himself the target of Stuart's posse of gunslingers, who will stop at nothing to prevent Hardin from delivering the evidence to the proper authorities. With no one to help him except a few of his friends, Hardin has to fight for his cattle, and his life.

programme.title: Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Ramsey McCay, a troubleshooter for the newly formed Wells Fargo company, maintains smooth routes to the west. He becomes separated from his wife during the Civil War until they reunite during the company's 20th anniversary.

programme.title: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Dockworker Terry Malloy (Marlon Brando) had been an up-and-coming boxer until powerful local mob boss Johnny Friendly (Lee J. Cobb) persuaded him to throw a fight. When a longshoreman is murdered before he can testify about Friendly's control of the Hoboken waterfront, Terry teams up with the dead man's sister Edie (Eva Marie Saint) and the streetwise priest Father Barry (Karl Malden) to testify himself, against the advice of Friendly's lawyer, Terry's older brother Charley (Rod Steiger).

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: Headstrong Thomas Dunson (John Wayne) starts a thriving Texas cattle ranch with the help of his faithful trail hand, Groot (Walter Brennan), and his protégé, Matt Garth (Montgomery Clift), an orphan Dunson took under his wing when Matt was a boy. In need of money following the Civil War, Dunson and Matt lead a cattle drive to Missouri, where they will get a better price than locally, but the crotchety older man and his willful young partner begin to butt heads on the exhausting journey.

programme.title: The Thrill Hunter
programme.desc: After lying about being a stuntman, a blowhard (Buck Jones) gets the chance to prove himself to a movie studio.

programme.title: Song of Nevada
programme.desc: A millionaire pretends to be dead and hires a cowboy to break up his daughter's romance and curb her scheming ways.

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A dead young man's affair with a beautiful widow brings odd, dangerous events to his grandmother's house.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A search begins for the murderer of Doc Holliday's friend.

programme.title: Rimfire
programme.desc: An undercover Army captain (James Millican) links missing gold and murder to a gambler's (Reed Hadley) ghost.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt Earp arrives in Tombstone unarmed.

programme.title: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Dockworker Terry Malloy (Marlon Brando) had been an up-and-coming boxer until powerful local mob boss Johnny Friendly (Lee J. Cobb) persuaded him to throw a fight. When a longshoreman is murdered before he can testify about Friendly's control of the Hoboken waterfront, Terry teams up with the dead man's sister Edie (Eva Marie Saint) and the streetwise priest Father Barry (Karl Malden) to testify himself, against the advice of Friendly's lawyer, Terry's older brother Charley (Rod Steiger).

programme.title: Apache Ambush
programme.desc: On a cattle drive to Kansas after the Civil War, an ex-Union soldier comes up against Apache and Confederate renegades.

programme.title: Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Ramsey McCay, a troubleshooter for the newly formed Wells Fargo company, maintains smooth routes to the west. He becomes separated from his wife during the Civil War until they reunite during the company's 20th anniversary.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: Headstrong Thomas Dunson (John Wayne) starts a thriving Texas cattle ranch with the help of his faithful trail hand, Groot (Walter Brennan), and his protégé, Matt Garth (Montgomery Clift), an orphan Dunson took under his wing when Matt was a boy. In need of money following the Civil War, Dunson and Matt lead a cattle drive to Missouri, where they will get a better price than locally, but the crotchety older man and his willful young partner begin to butt heads on the exhausting journey.

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Four soldiers of fortune are hired by a wealthy rancher to rescue his beautiful young wife who has been kidnapped by a villainous Mexican bandit. When they finally find her, after fighting their way across deserts and mountains, they discover she is not being held against her will. This causes friction within the band as to whether they should honor their agreement.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After hired hand Tom Chaney (Jeff Corey) murders the father of 14-year-old Mattie Ross (Kim Darby), she seeks vengeance and hires U.S. Marshal Rooster Cogburn (John Wayne), a man of true grit, to track Chaney into Indian territory. As the two begin their pursuit, a Texas Ranger, La Boeuf (Glen Campbell), joins the manhunt in hopes of capturing Chaney for the murder of a Texas senator and collecting a substantial reward. The three clash on their quest of bringing to justice the same man.

programme.title: From Here to Eternity
programme.desc: At an Army barracks in Hawaii in the days preceding the attack on Pearl Harbor, lone-wolf soldier and boxing champion Prew Prewitt (Montgomery Clift) refuses to box, preferring to play the bugle instead. Hard-hearted Capt. Holmes (Philip Ober) subjects Prew to a grueling series of punishments while, unknown to Holmes, the gruff but fair Sgt. Warden (Burt Lancaster) engages in a clandestine affair with the captain's mistreated wife (Deborah Kerr).

programme.title: Canyon Passage
programme.desc: Logan Stuart (Dana Andrews) is the proprietor of a general store in an Oregon mining town. His best friend, George Camrose (Brian Donlevy), is a greedy banker and compulsive gambler. Logan falls in love with Camrose's fiancée, Lucy Overmire (Susan Hayward), but proposes to his own girlfriend, Caroline Marsh (Patricia Roc), despite his secret love for Lucy. While dealing with romantic issues, Logan must also deal with murder, rape, robbery attempts, brawls and Native American attacks.

programme.title: The Fatal Mallet
programme.desc: Three men play dirty tricks to charm a beautiful young woman.

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes is visited by a woman who is concerned about her husband's habit of smoking opium to heighten his writing ability.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Old Man Clanton comes to town to kill Wyatt.

programme.title: Apache Ambush
programme.desc: On a cattle drive to Kansas after the Civil War, an ex-Union soldier comes up against Apache and Confederate renegades.

programme.title: From Here to Eternity
programme.desc: At an Army barracks in Hawaii in the days preceding the attack on Pearl Harbor, lone-wolf soldier and boxing champion Prew Prewitt (Montgomery Clift) refuses to box, preferring to play the bugle instead. Hard-hearted Capt. Holmes (Philip Ober) subjects Prew to a grueling series of punishments while, unknown to Holmes, the gruff but fair Sgt. programme.title: NECTAR TRI-PILLOW -Cooler, Comfy, Better Sleep! Buy One Get One FREE!
programme.desc: Discover the Nectar Tri-Comfort Cooling Pillow for the ultimate sleep experience! Adjustable to three firmness levels to provide customized support and cooling all night long. Order NOW to get a second pillow FREE, plus a 30-night home trial!

programme.title: Canyon Passage
programme.desc: Logan Stuart (Dana Andrews) is the proprietor of a general store in an Oregon mining town. His best friend, George Camrose (Brian Donlevy), is a greedy banker and compulsive gambler. Logan falls in love with Camrose's fiancée, Lucy Overmire (Susan Hayward), but proposes to his own girlfriend, Caroline Marsh (Patricia Roc), despite his secret love for Lucy. While dealing with romantic issues, Logan must also deal with murder, rape, robbery attempts, brawls and Native American attacks.

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Four soldiers of fortune are hired by a wealthy rancher to rescue his beautiful young wife who has been kidnapped by a villainous Mexican bandit. When they finally find her, after fighting their way across deserts and mountains, they discover she is not being held against her will. This causes friction within the band as to whether they should honor their agreement.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: Enigmatic gunslinger Shane (Alan Ladd) rides into a small Wyoming town with hopes of quietly settling down as a farmhand. Taking a job on homesteader Joe Starrett's (Van Heflin) farm, Shane is drawn into a battle between the townsfolk and ruthless cattle baron Rufus Ryker (Emile Meyer). Shane's growing attraction to Starrett's wife, Marian (Jean Arthur), and his fondness for their son Joey (Brandon de Wilde), who idolizes Shane, force Shane to realize that he must thwart Ryker's plan.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After hired hand Tom Chaney (Jeff Corey) murders the father of 14-year-old Mattie Ross (Kim Darby), she seeks vengeance and hires U.S. Marshal Rooster Cogburn (John Wayne), a man of true grit, to track Chaney into Indian territory. As the two begin their pursuit, a Texas Ranger, La Boeuf (Glen Campbell), joins the manhunt in hopes of capturing Chaney for the murder of a Texas senator and collecting a substantial reward. The three clash on their quest of bringing to justice the same man.

programme.title: Marty
programme.desc: This acclaimed romantic drama follows the life of Marty Piletti (Ernest Borgnine), a stout bachelor butcher who lives with his mother (Esther Minciotti) in the Bronx. Always unlucky in love, Marty reluctantly goes out to a ballroom one night and meets a nice teacher named Clara (Betsy Blair). Though Marty and Clara hit it off, his relatives discourage him from pursuing the relationship, and he must decide between his family's approval or a shot at finding romance.

programme.title: Cimarron
programme.desc: In 1889, adventurous lawyer and newspaper editor Yancey Cravat (Richard Dix) convinces his genteel wife, Sabra (Irene Dunne), to join him in the rush to populate Osage, Oklahoma. After they begin to settle into the community, Yancey leaves to go further west. Alone, Sabra inherits his editorial duties and struggles to bring civilization to the rough frontier town. Over a tumultuous 40 years, the couple are repeatedly separated and reunited as Oklahoma makes its long journey to statehood.

programme.title: Sports Sunday
programme.desc: Sports Sunday presents top scores and covers top sports news from all over the world and latest sports events. In ten minutes Elliot Richardson provides sports round-up for you not to miss a thing.

programme.title: Magnificent Obsession
programme.desc: (1954) Douglas Sirk's melodrama starring Rock Hudson and Jane Wyman. A playboy reforms his lifestyle in order to seek forgiveness from a woman whose husband's death he inadvertently caused.

programme.title: The Frogmen
programme.desc: (1951) Second World War thriller. Richard Widmark, Dana Andrews and Robert Wagner star as divers with a special underwater demolition team taking the war to the Japanese in the Pacific.

programme.title: It Should Happen to You
programme.desc: (1954) Judy Holliday stars in this comedy as a smalltown girl who comes to New York and rents a billboard to publicise her name - and soon she's a TV star. With Jack Lemmon.

programme.title: Destination Gobi
programme.desc: (1953) Fact-based Second World War adventure. Richard Widmark stars as a US Navy officer who leads an alliance of scientists and tribesmen against the Japanese in Mongolia.

programme.title: Entrapment
programme.desc: (1999) Action thriller starring Sean Connery as Robert 'Mac' MacDougal, one of the world's finest art thieves, and Catherine Zeta-Jones as the insurance company agent out to trap him.

programme.title: Orphan: First Kill
programme.desc: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: (2019) Partially animated action film based on a popular manga comic. Alita, a deadly cyborg brought back to life by a mourning scientist, sets out to discover her true identity.

programme.title: Mean Streets
programme.desc: (1973) Scorsese's classic crime drama about the ordinary lives of mafiosi - the boredom, casual violence and shattered dreams - in Little Italy, with Harvey Keitel and Robert De Niro.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Leave Her to Heaven
programme.desc: (1945) Riveting film noir melodrama starring Oscar-nominated Gene Tierney as an irredeemably evil, possessive woman who resorts to murder to keep her husband (Cornel Wilde) with her.

programme.title: Halls of Montezuma
programme.desc: (1951) Second World War drama. Richard Widmark stars as a commanding officer leading US Marines into the Pacific to capture Japanese prisoners and discover the location of a rocket base.

programme.title: Sailor of the King
programme.desc: (1953) Drama starring Jeffrey Hunter as a Canadian serving in the WWII Royal Navy who is captured by the German raider that sunk his ship but escapes and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Tomahawk
programme.desc: (1951) Western starring Van Heflin. During the uprising of the Sioux nation, a cunning scout attempts to save the 7th Cavalry after an officer orders the brutal massacre of Sioux innocents.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: (2008) Remake of the sci-fi classic with Keanu Reeves. An alien visits Earth to tell humankind to stop destroying the planet. But when he's attacked, he decides to eradicate us instead...

programme.title: The Creator
programme.desc: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

programme.title: A Hidden Life
programme.desc: (2019) Epic World War II drama telling the agonising story of one man's fight for the right to not kill. A conscientious objector from rural Austria refuses to fight for Germany.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Send Me No Flowers
programme.desc: (1964) Romcom starring Rock Hudson and Doris Day. Thinking he has just a few months to live, a man makes his wife suspect he's having an affair when he tries to find her a new partner.

programme.title: Gunman's Walk
programme.desc: (1958) Western. Van Heflin stars as a veteran frontiersman whose determination to mould his sons in his gun-totin' image backfires disastrously. With Tab Hunter and James Darren.

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

programme.title: Bridge of Spies
programme.desc: (2015) Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance star in Steven Spielberg's Cold War spy drama. After gaining notoriety for defending a Soviet spy, a US lawyer then tries to free a CIA pilot.

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: (2023) Tina Satter's tense fact-based whistleblower drama stars Sydney Sweeney (White Lotus) as Reality Winner - a young woman being questioned by the FBI about leaked top-secret documents.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: (2010) Action-thriller starring Angelina Jolie. A CIA agent goes on the run after a Russian defector claims that she's a sleeper agent who's about to commit a terrible act of terrorism.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: (2020) Dark comedy drama based on a viral Twitter thread. Dancer Zola (Taylour Paige) joins a road trip to Tampa, where she gets dragged too far into the sex work world. Adults only.

programme.title: Shiva Baby
programme.desc: (2020) Comedy-drama. A college student struggles to keep a lid on her secrets as she awkwardly encounters her sugar daddy and the ex-girlfriend she's still hung up on at a shiva.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Ride Lonesome
programme.desc: (1959) Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

programme.title: Yellow Sky
programme.desc: (1949) Western. Gregory Peck plays the leader of an outlaw gang whose plans to rob an old man and his granddaughter of their gold go seriously awry. With Anne Baxter and Richard Widmark.

programme.title: For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: (1943) Drama. Director Sam Wood's epic adaptation of Ernest Hemingway's classic story about the Spanish Civil War. Starring Oscar-nominees Gary Cooper and Ingrid Bergman.

programme.title: Monkey Business
programme.desc: (1952) Screwball comedy starring Cary Grant as a scientist who drinks the elixir of youth and starts acting the fool, as does his strait-laced wife (Ginger Rogers).

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: (2004) All-action thriller. Queen Latifah stars as the driver of the fastest taxi in New York, who teams up with an inept cop (Jimmy Fallon) to catch a team of female bank-robbers.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

programme.title: Deja Vu
programme.desc: (2006) Pulsating sci-fi action with Denzel Washington and Val Kilmer. An AFT agent uses new technology to reach back in time, stop a ferry bombing, and save the love of his life. Simple.

programme.title: Undergods
programme.desc: (2020) Dystopian fantasy that weaves together three eerie tales of doomed modernity, framed by the day-to-day of two garbage men who collect corpses from the streets of a ruined estate.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Admirable Crichton
programme.desc: (1957) Comedy. Kenneth More stars as the perfect butler, who assumes command when he, his aristocratic employer (Cecil Parker) and his family and friends are shipwrecked on a desert island.

programme.title: The Lavender Hill Mob
programme.desc: (1951) Classic Ealing comedy starring Alec Guinness as a mild-mannered bank clerk who assembles a gang to hijack a million quid's worth of gold. Which is when their problems really start...

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: (2014) Jamie Foxx stars in this reboot of the 1982 musical. Orphan Annie is transported to post-2008 recession-hit New York, where she becomes the ward of a germaphobe running for mayor.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: (2008) Remake of the sci-fi classic with Keanu Reeves. An alien visits Earth to tell humankind to stop destroying the planet. But when he's attacked, he decides to eradicate us instead...

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: (2016) Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: The Menu
programme.desc: (2022) Horror with Ralph Fiennes and Anya Taylor-Joy. Only one diner at an exclusive eatery sees through the foam quenelles to the pile of steaming prairie oysters beyond. Mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Orphan: First Kill
programme.desc: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for...
programme.desc: ...Peculiar Children: (2016) Eva Green and Asa Butterfield star in Tim Burton's fantasy adventure. A teenager enters the magical, but scary and violent, world where his grandfather grew up.

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Tequila Sunrise: Classic detective series. Extortion and blackmail lead to a man being murdered, an old friend of Makepeace's being badly injured, and Makepeace taking Dempsey home. S2 Ep5

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: The Man from Marseilles: Classic US action drama series. Thomas teams up with a Frenchman who is claiming to be the world-famous detective profiled in Robin's latest book. S5 Ep16

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A Wind from Corsica: Classic US detective drama. A convict uses a medical experiment as a chance to escape to New York, but he does not realise that he is carrying a deadly virus. S3 Ep18

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Barbour Jackets and Fire Extinguishers: Discover how an innovative fire extinguisher is saving lives, then see the care and attention that goes into making a Barbour waxed jacket. S1 Ep7

programme.title: European Qualifier: Ukraine v England
programme.desc: Katie Shanahan presents coverage as England's Lionesses get their qualifying campaign for the FIFA Women's World Cup in Brazil in 2027 under way against Ukraine.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Russian Killer: Extreme fisherman Jeremy heads to Russia's remote Amur river to investigate the mysterious deaths of three men and their links to a reclusive freshwater giant. S4 Ep7

programme.title: New: More Than Machine
programme.desc: Documentary series following members of the M-Sport World Rally Championship team as they face the trials and tribulations of competing in rally driving at the highest level. S2 Ep5

programme.title: New: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Killer Pass: Nail-biting documentary series. Heavy haul veterans Jack Jessee and Carey Hill make time for practical jokes while taking two multi-purpose storage tanks to Deadhorse. S3 Ep8

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Ricochet, Chris Jericho, Kris Statlander, Darby Allin and Claudio Castagnoli.

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: The Alien: Classic comedy-drama series set in Germany. When the boys have problems with a hard-drinking troublemaker, Neville comes up with an ingenious solution to get rid of him. S1 Ep9

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Rocky Eight and a Half: Drama series about the shady dealings of a loveable rogue. Arthur uses all his persuasive powers to cajole Terry into donning his boxing gloves once more. S4 Ep1

programme.title: Shardlake
programme.desc: The concluding part of the compelling whodunnit series. Shardlake faces a stark choice after uncovering the history behind the murder weapon and the true owner of the sword. S1 Ep4

programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: The Best of the 70s
programme.desc: A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1970s - from horse racing to table football and Formula One to darts - that includes many memorable moments.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents footballing action from October 1977 featuring Leyton Orient v Tottenham Hotspur at Brisbane Road, Sunderland v Brighton, and Ipswich Town v Newcastle United. S7 Ep7

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore hosts highlights from October 1977 as Queens Park Rangers take on Everton, Stoke City face Crystal Palace, and Liverpool play Chelsea at Anfield. S7 Ep8

programme.desc: The Man from Marseilles: Classic US action drama series. Thomas teams up with a Frenchman who is claiming to be the world-famous detective profiled in Robin's latest book. S5 Ep16

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A Wind from Corsica: Classic US detective drama. A convict uses a medical experiment as a chance to escape to New York, but he does not realise that he is carrying a deadly virus. S3 Ep18

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Don't Buy from Me Argentina: Classic drama. Ken finds himself investigating an insurance swindle involving an Argentine polo team, and Rocky is put in charge of a valuable painting. S4 Ep11

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Taste of Fear: Classic '70s police series. A new recruit joins the Sweeney in time to investigate a violent burglary by a group of ex-soldiers, but Regan doesn't think he's up to it. S3 Ep5

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Blood Money: Classic detective series. The duo probe the connections between a murdered antiques dealer and an Arab embassy official with diplomatic immunity after a robbery. S2 Ep6

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Torah! Torah! Torah!: Classic US action drama series. Thomas probes the theft of a rare edition of the Jewish holy book the Torah and is aided by a policewoman chasing smugglers. S5 Ep17

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Bad Dude: Classic US detective drama. A private detective sets himself up as a potential target for a hired killer and does not take kindly to Theo's attempts to rescue him. S3 Ep19

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: All in a Day's Pork: Classic drama. While Ken is hired to find out who has been taking Dictaphone tapes from a meat company, he also uncovers a plot to import pornographic material. S4 Ep12

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Bad Apple: When a convicted criminal grasses up a group of CID officers involved in bribery, Regan and Carter go undercover to investigate the corruption charges against them. S3 Ep6

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: High Drains Pilferer: Drama series about the shady dealings of a rogue. Terry has the misfortune to be driving for mobster Micky the Fish when his mistress's jewellery is stolen. S4 Ep3

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Pack of Teeth: Adventurer and extreme fisherman Jeremy Wade journeys into the swamps of southern Africa to investigate stories of a piranha-like fish that hunts in packs. S4 Ep1

programme.title: CDR: Real Sociedad v Athletic Club
programme.desc: Coverage of 2025-26 Copa del Rey semi-final second-leg action as Real Sociedad play host to Athletic Club in a Basque derby for a place in the Spanish Cup final.

programme.title: Magnificent Obsession
programme.desc: (1954) Douglas Sirk's melodrama starring Rock Hudson and Jane Wyman. A playboy reforms his lifestyle in order to seek forgiveness from a woman whose husband's death he inadvertently caused.

programme.title: The Frogmen
programme.desc: (1951) Second World War thriller. Richard Widmark, Dana Andrews and Robert Wagner star as divers with a special underwater demolition team taking the war to the Japanese in the Pacific.

programme.title: It Should Happen to You
programme.desc: (1954) Judy Holliday stars in this comedy as a smalltown girl who comes to New York and rents a billboard to publicise her name - and soon she's a TV star. With Jack Lemmon.

programme.title: Destination Gobi
programme.desc: (1953) Fact-based Second World War adventure. Richard Widmark stars as a US Navy officer who leads an alliance of scientists and tribesmen against the Japanese in Mongolia.

programme.title: Entrapment
programme.desc: (1999) Action thriller starring Sean Connery as Robert 'Mac' MacDougal, one of the world's finest art thieves, and Catherine Zeta-Jones as the insurance company agent out to trap him.

programme.title: Orphan: First Kill
programme.desc: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: (2019) Partially animated action film based on a popular manga comic. Alita, a deadly cyborg brought back to life by a mourning scientist, sets out to discover her true identity.

programme.title: Mean Streets
programme.desc: (1973) Scorsese's classic crime drama about the ordinary lives of mafiosi - the boredom, casual violence and shattered dreams - in Little Italy, with Harvey Keitel and Robert De Niro.

programme.title: Halls of Montezuma
programme.desc: (1951) Second World War drama. Richard Widmark stars as a commanding officer leading US Marines into the Pacific to capture Japanese prisoners and discover the location of a rocket base.

programme.title: Sailor of the King
programme.desc: (1953) Drama starring Jeffrey Hunter as a Canadian serving in the WWII Royal Navy who is captured by the German raider that sunk his ship but escapes and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Tomahawk
programme.desc: (1951) Western starring Van Heflin. During the uprising of the Sioux nation, a cunning scout attempts to save the 7th Cavalry after an officer orders the brutal massacre of Sioux innocents.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: (2008) Remake of the sci-fi classic with Keanu Reeves. An alien visits Earth to tell humankind to stop destroying the planet. But when he's attacked, he decides to eradicate us instead...

programme.title: The Creator
programme.desc: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

programme.title: A Hidden Life
programme.desc: (2019) Epic World War II drama telling the agonising story of one man's fight for the right to not kill. A conscientious objector from rural Austria refuses to fight for Germany.

programme.title: Send Me No Flowers

programme.title: Gunman's Walk
programme.desc: (1958) Western. Van Heflin stars as a veteran frontiersman whose determination to mould his sons in his gun-totin' image backfires disastrously. With Tab Hunter and James Darren.

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

programme.title: Bridge of Spies
programme.desc: (2015) Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance star in Steven Spielberg's Cold War spy drama. After gaining notoriety for defending a Soviet spy, a US lawyer then tries to free a CIA pilot.

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: (2023) Tina Satter's tense fact-based whistleblower drama stars Sydney Sweeney (White Lotus) as Reality Winner - a young woman being questioned by the FBI about leaked top-secret documents.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: (2010) Action-thriller starring Angelina Jolie. A CIA agent goes on the run after a Russian defector claims that she's a sleeper agent who's about to commit a terrible act of terrorism.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: (2020) Dark comedy drama based on a viral Twitter thread. Dancer Zola (Taylour Paige) joins a road trip to Tampa, where she gets dragged too far into the sex work world. Adults only.

programme.title: Shiva Baby
programme.desc: (2020) Comedy-drama. A college student struggles to keep a lid on her secrets as she awkwardly encounters her sugar daddy and the ex-girlfriend she's still hung up on at a shiva.

programme.desc: (1959) Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

programme.title: Yellow Sky
programme.desc: (1949) Western. Gregory Peck plays the leader of an outlaw gang whose plans to rob an old man and his granddaughter of their gold go seriously awry. With Anne Baxter and Richard Widmark.

programme.title: For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: (1943) Drama. Director Sam Wood's epic adaptation of Ernest Hemingway's classic story about the Spanish Civil War. Starring Oscar-nominees Gary Cooper and Ingrid Bergman.

programme.title: Monkey Business
programme.desc: (1952) Screwball comedy starring Cary Grant as a scientist who drinks the elixir of youth and starts acting the fool, as does his strait-laced wife (Ginger Rogers).

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: (2004) All-action thriller. Queen Latifah stars as the driver of the fastest taxi in New York, who teams up with an inept cop (Jimmy Fallon) to catch a team of female bank-robbers.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

programme.title: Deja Vu
programme.desc: (2006) Pulsating sci-fi action with Denzel Washington and Val Kilmer. An AFT agent uses new technology to reach back in time, stop a ferry bombing, and save the love of his life. Simple.

programme.title: Undergods
programme.desc: (2020) Dystopian fantasy that weaves together three eerie tales of doomed modernity, framed by the day-to-day of two garbage men who collect corpses from the streets of a ruined estate.
